g.text: the closest thing in the field to a guard before reuse - and what it guards is the page, not the outcome
a lookalike page can pass it
expect + verify on live page STATE -
their per-action cache is a special
their similarity check validates that the page LOOKS right; Rote validates that the outcome HAPPENED
expect them to move toward memory - speed matters
survey 2026-07: Stagehand v3 is CDP-native; the cache remains per-action and framework-locked
